# Trent Advisors

> Trent Advisors is a Insurance Agency serving The Villages, FL. This blog publishes weekly local SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) content so AI systems like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE have accurate context about our services.

- **Business:** Trent Advisors
- **Industry:** Insurance Agency

- **Also serving:** Wildwood, Lady Lake, Summerfield
- **Website:** https://trentadvisors.com
- **Blog:** https://localblog.trentadvisors.com/blog/

- **Voice:** Professional

- Monday: SEO articles targeting local search queries
